dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Hello! How are you?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'm fine, thanks. And you?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I'm good too!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you work?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I do.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you like your job?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I like it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you speak English?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, a little.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you study every day?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I try to.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have a car?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: No, I don't.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have a bike?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I have a bike.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you like coffee?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I love coffee.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you drink it every day?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, every morning.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you study English?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I do.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you practice every day?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I try to practice every day.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have a family?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I do.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have children?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: No, I don't.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have a dog?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I have a dog.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have a cat too?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: No, just a dog.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you eat breakfast?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, every day.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you cook at home?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I cook at home.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you exercise?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, sometimes.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you walk every day?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: No, not every day.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you watch TV?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I do.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you like movies?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I love movies.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you read books?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I like reading.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you read in English?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Sometimes, yes.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have a smartphone?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I do.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you use it for work?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, all the time.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you sleep well?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Usually, yes.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you go to bed early?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: No, I sleep late.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you like music?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I love music.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you play an instrument?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: No, I don't.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you take the bus?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, every day.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you drive to work?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: No, I take the bus.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you like sports?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I do.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you play football?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, on weekends.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you shop online?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, sometimes.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you buy clothes online?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, it's very easy.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have friends at work?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I do.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have lunch with them?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, sometimes.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you like to travel?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I love it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you travel every year?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: No, not every year.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you do?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'm a teacher.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Where do you work?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I work at a school.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Where do you live?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I live in São Paulo.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you like living there?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, it's a great city.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: When do you start work?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I start at eight.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: When do you finish?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I finish at five.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you eat for breakfast?
dialogue.pt: O que você come no café da manhã?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I eat bread and drink coffee.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What about lunch?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I have rice and beans.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What time do you wake up?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I wake up at six thirty.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you do first?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I take a shower and have breakfast.
dialogue.pt: Tomo banho e café da manhã.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you do on weekends?
dialogue.pt: O que você faz nos fins de semana?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I rest and spend time with my family.
dialogue.pt: Descanso e fico com minha família.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Where do you usually go?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: We go to the park or the mall.
dialogue.pt: Vamos ao parque ou ao shopping.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: When do you study English?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I study in the morning.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How long do you study?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: About thirty minutes a day.
dialogue.pt: Cerca de trinta minutos por dia.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Where do you buy your food?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I go to the supermarket.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: When do you go?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I usually go on Saturdays.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you do after work?
dialogue.pt: O que você faz depois do trabalho?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I watch TV or read a book.
dialogue.pt: Assisto TV ou leio um livro.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What kind of shows do you watch?
dialogue.pt: Que tipo de série você assiste?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I like series and documentaries.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How do you get to work?
dialogue.pt: Como você vai para o trabalho?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I take the subway.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How long does it take?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: About forty minutes.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: When do you go to the gym?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I go three times a week.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you do there?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I run and lift weights.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Where does your family live?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: They live in another city.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: When do you visit them?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I visit them on holidays.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What kind of music do you like?
dialogue.pt: Que tipo de música você gosta?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I like pop and rock music.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Who is your favorite artist?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I really like The Beatles.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Where do you usually have lunch?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I have lunch at work.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you eat?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I eat at the company restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Where do you go on vacation?
dialogue.pt: Para onde você vai nas férias?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I usually go to the beach.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How long do you stay?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: About two weeks.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What time do you go to bed?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I go to bed around eleven.
dialogue.pt: Vou dormir por volta das onze.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How many hours do you sleep?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: About seven or eight hours.
dialogue.pt: Cerca de sete ou oito horas.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What languages do you speak?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I speak Portuguese and some English.
dialogue.pt: Falo português e um pouco de inglês.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Where do you practice English?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I practice with apps and online videos.
dialogue.pt: Pratico com apps e vídeos online.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you do for fun?
dialogue.pt: O que você faz por diversão?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I play video games.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What games do you play?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I like football and adventure games.
dialogue.pt: Gosto de futebol e jogos de aventura.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How long have you worked there?
dialogue.pt: Há quanto tempo você trabalha lá?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I have worked there for three years.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you like it?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I really like it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What kind of food do you like?
dialogue.pt: Que tipo de comida você gosta?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I like Italian and Japanese food.
dialogue.pt: Gosto de comida italiana e japonesa.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What is your favorite dish?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I love pasta and sushi.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: When do you meet your friends?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: We usually meet on weekends.
dialogue.pt: Geralmente nos encontramos nos fins de semana.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you do together?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: We go out for dinner or watch a game.
dialogue.pt: Saímos para jantar ou assistimos a um jogo.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What is your morning routine?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I wake up, exercise, shower, and have breakfast.
dialogue.pt: Acordo, me exercito, tomo banho e café.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How long does it take?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: About an hour and a half.
dialogue.pt: Cerca de uma hora e meia.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What are your plans for the weekend?
dialogue.pt: Quais são seus planos para o fim de semana?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'm going to visit my parents.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Where do they live?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: They live about two hours from here.
dialogue.pt: Eles moram a cerca de duas horas daqui.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you like most about your job?
dialogue.pt: O que você mais gosta no seu trabalho?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I like the team and the challenges.
dialogue.pt: Gosto da equipe e dos desafios.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you like least?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: The long meetings.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How do you take care of your health?
dialogue.pt: Como você cuida da sua saúde?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I exercise regularly and eat well.
dialogue.pt: Me exercito regularmente e como bem.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you eat to stay healthy?
dialogue.pt: O que você come para se manter saudável?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: A lot of vegetables, fruits, and water.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How long have you been in this area?
dialogue.pt: Há quanto tempo você está nessa área?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I have been working here for five years.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Did you always want to do this?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Not exactly, but I really like it now.
dialogue.pt: Não exatamente, mas gosto muito agora.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you like about your city?
dialogue.pt: O que você gosta da sua cidade?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I like the restaurants and the parks.
dialogue.pt: Gosto dos restaurantes e dos parques.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What would you change?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I would improve public transport.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you do on holidays?
dialogue.pt: O que você faz nos feriados?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I spend time with my family.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you travel on holidays?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Sometimes, if the holiday is long.
dialogue.pt: Às vezes, se o feriado for longo.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What apps do you use most?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I use WhatsApp, Instagram, and Google Maps.
dialogue.pt: Uso WhatsApp, Instagram e Google Maps.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you use any apps for work?
dialogue.pt: Você usa algum app para trabalho?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I use Slack and Google Meet.
dialogue.pt: Sim, uso Slack e Google Meet.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How do you learn new things?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I watch videos online and read articles.
dialogue.pt: Assisto vídeos online e leio artigos.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What are you learning now?
dialogue.pt: O que você está aprendendo agora?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I am learning English and data analysis.
dialogue.pt: Estou aprendendo inglês e análise de dados.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have a meeting today?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I have one at ten.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can you send me the agenda?
dialogue.pt: Você pode me enviar a pauta?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Sure, I'll send it right now.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How is the project going?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: It's going well. We're on track.
dialogue.pt: Está indo bem. Estamos dentro do prazo.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: When will it be ready?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: We should finish by Friday.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Hello, this is Ana. Can I speak to John?
dialogue.pt: Olá, sou a Ana. Posso falar com o John?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: He's in a meeting right now.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can you ask him to call me back?
dialogue.pt: Pode pedir que ele me ligue de volta?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Of course. I'll give him the message.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can you help me with this report?
dialogue.pt: Você pode me ajudar com este relatório?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Sure, what do you need?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I need to check the numbers.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Let me take a look with you.
dialogue.pt: Deixa eu dar uma olhada com você.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Are you free tomorrow afternoon?
dialogue.pt: Você está livre amanhã à tarde?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, after two o'clock.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can we meet at three?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: That works for me.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Who is working on the presentation?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I am. I started yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you need any help?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, can you review the slides?
dialogue.pt: Sim, você pode revisar os slides?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can you send me the contract?
dialogue.pt: Você pode me enviar o contrato?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, which email should I use?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Use my work email, please.
dialogue.pt: Use meu email de trabalho, por favor.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Done. I just sent it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: When is the deadline for this task?
dialogue.pt: Qual é o prazo para essa tarefa?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: It's due on Thursday.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can we extend it to Friday?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'll check with the manager.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What did you do yesterday?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I finished the client report.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Did you send it to them?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I sent it in the morning.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: We have a problem with the system.
dialogue.pt: Temos um problema com o sistema.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: What happened?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: It went down this morning.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'll call IT right away.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can we meet at three o'clock?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I have a call at three. What about four?
dialogue.pt: Tenho uma ligação às três. Que tal às quatro?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Four works. Conference room B?
dialogue.pt: Quatro está bom. Sala de reunião B?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Perfect. See you there.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How was the presentation?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: It went well. The client liked it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What did they say?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: They want to move forward with the project.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can you handle the client call today?
dialogue.pt: Você pode atender a ligação do cliente hoje?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, what time is it?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: At two o'clock. I'll send you the notes.
dialogue.pt: Às duas. Vou te enviar as anotações.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Great, I'll be ready.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Have you finished the monthly report?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Not yet. I need two more hours.
dialogue.pt: Ainda não. Preciso de mais duas horas.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can you send it before five?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I'll have it done by then.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Are you working from home today?
dialogue.pt: Você está trabalhando de casa hoje?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I have a quiet day.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can you join the video call at noon?
dialogue.pt: Pode entrar na videochamada ao meio-dia?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Of course. I'll be online.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Are you going to the conference next week?
dialogue.pt: Você vai à conferência na próxima semana?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I'm flying on Monday.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How long will you be there?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Three days. I'll be back Thursday.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do we have the budget for this?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I need to check with finance.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How long will that take?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I should know by tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: The client is waiting in the lobby.
dialogue.pt: O cliente está esperando no lobby.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'll be there in five minutes.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can you offer them something to drink?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Of course. I'll do that now.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you want to have lunch together?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Sure, what time?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Is twelve thirty okay?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Perfect. Where should we go?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How are you doing this month?
dialogue.pt: Como você está se saindo este mês?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Pretty well. I finished all my tasks.
dialogue.pt: Muito bem. Terminei todas as minhas tarefas.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Is there anything you need?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: More time for planning would help.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: We are starting a new project next month.
dialogue.pt: Começamos um novo projeto no próximo mês.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: That's exciting! What is it about?
dialogue.pt: Que ótimo! Do que se trata?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: It's about improving our mobile app.
dialogue.pt: É sobre melhorar nosso app mobile.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'd love to be part of the team.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: The system is down. What do we do?
dialogue.pt: O sistema está fora. O que fazemos?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I already contacted the tech team.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How long will it take to fix?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: They said about two hours.
dialogue.pt: Eles disseram cerca de duas horas.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Are you going to the training session?
dialogue.pt: Você vai à sessão de treinamento?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, it starts at nine.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What is it about?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Leadership and communication skills.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can we work on this together?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Absolutely. When do you want to start?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How about this afternoon?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Works for me. Let's meet at two.
dialogue.pt: Funciona para mim. Vamos nos encontrar às duas.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How far are you with the analysis?
dialogue.pt: Até onde você foi com a análise?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'm about halfway through.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Will you finish today?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I think so. I just need a few more hours.
dialogue.pt: Acho que sim. Só preciso de mais algumas horas.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What should we do about the delay?
dialogue.pt: O que devemos fazer sobre o atraso?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: We should talk to the client first.
dialogue.pt: Devemos falar com o cliente primeiro.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Should I send an email or call?
dialogue.pt: Devo enviar um email ou ligar?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Call. It's more personal.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What is most important this week?
dialogue.pt: O que é mais importante esta semana?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Finishing the proposal for the client.
dialogue.pt: Terminar a proposta para o cliente.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: And after that?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: The internal report for management.
dialogue.pt: O relatório interno para a diretoria.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Are you busy right now?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: A little, but I can talk. What do you need?
dialogue.pt: Um pouco, mas posso falar. O que precisa?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I need five minutes to review something.
dialogue.pt: Preciso de cinco minutos para revisar algo.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Sure, let's do it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Did you send the weekly report?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Not yet. I'm finishing it now.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Please send it by noon.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: No problem. It will be ready.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What is the plan for next week?
dialogue.pt: Qual é o plano para a próxima semana?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: We have two client meetings and a product review.
dialogue.pt: Temos duas reuniões com clientes e uma revisão de produto.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Who is leading the product review?
dialogue.pt: Quem está liderando a revisão de produto?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Carlos is. He's been preparing for it.
dialogue.pt: Carlos está. Ele tem se preparado para isso.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you think about the new policy?
dialogue.pt: O que você acha da nova política?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Honestly, I think it's a good change.
dialogue.pt: Honestamente, acho que é uma boa mudança.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Why do you say that?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: It gives the team more flexibility and trust.
dialogue.pt: Dá mais flexibilidade e confiança à equipe.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Should we accept this proposal?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I think we should. The terms are fair.
dialogue.pt: Acho que sim. Os termos são justos.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What about the timeline?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: It's tight, but we can manage if we plan well.
dialogue.pt: É apertado, mas conseguimos se planejarmos bem.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Why do you think the numbers dropped?
dialogue.pt: Por que você acha que os números caíram?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I believe it's a seasonal trend.
dialogue.pt: Acredito que é uma tendência sazonal.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have data to support that?
dialogue.pt: Você tem dados para embasar isso?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, the same happened last year at this time.
dialogue.pt: Sim, o mesmo aconteceu no ano passado nessa época.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What would you recommend in this situation?
dialogue.pt: O que você recomendaria nessa situação?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I would start by talking to the stakeholders.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: And if they don't agree?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Then we need to find a middle ground.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: We need to reduce costs by fifteen percent.
dialogue.pt: Precisamos reduzir custos em quinze por cento.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: That's a big cut. Where do you suggest we start?
dialogue.pt: É um corte grande. Por onde você sugere começar?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I think we can optimize our processes first.
dialogue.pt: Acho que podemos otimizar nossos processos primeiro.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Agreed. Let's map out the biggest expenses.
dialogue.pt: Concordo. Vamos mapear os maiores gastos.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I think we should launch in Q1.
dialogue.pt: Acho que devemos lançar no primeiro trimestre.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'm not sure I agree. We're not ready yet.
dialogue.pt: Não tenho certeza se concordo. Ainda não estamos prontos.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do we need to be ready?
dialogue.pt: O que precisamos para estar prontos?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: At minimum, a full round of testing.
dialogue.pt: No mínimo, uma rodada completa de testes.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Where do you see yourself in five years?
dialogue.pt: Onde você se vê em cinco anos?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'd like to be leading my own team.
dialogue.pt: Gostaria de liderar minha própria equipe.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What are you doing to get there?
dialogue.pt: O que você está fazendo para chegar lá?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'm developing my leadership and technical skills.
dialogue.pt: Estou desenvolvendo habilidades de liderança e técnicas.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What is the biggest challenge you face at work?
dialogue.pt: Qual é o maior desafio que você enfrenta no trabalho?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Managing time and competing priorities.
dialogue.pt: Gerenciar o tempo e prioridades que competem entre si.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How do you handle that?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I use a task list and block time in my calendar.
dialogue.pt: Uso uma lista de tarefas e bloqueio tempo na agenda.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What is most important to you at work?
dialogue.pt: O que é mais importante para você no trabalho?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Being part of a team that communicates well.
dialogue.pt: Fazer parte de uma equipe que se comunica bem.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What else matters to you?
dialogue.pt: O que mais importa para você?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Doing work that has a real impact.
dialogue.pt: Fazer um trabalho que tenha impacto real.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How can we improve our process?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I think we need better communication between teams.
dialogue.pt: Acho que precisamos de melhor comunicação entre equipes.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can you give an example?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Sometimes design finishes something but dev doesn't know.
dialogue.pt: Às vezes o design termina algo mas o dev não sabe.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Should we take this new opportunity?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: It depends. What are the risks?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: The main risk is the upfront investment.
dialogue.pt: O principal risco é o investimento inicial.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: If the return is good, I say we go for it.
dialogue.pt: Se o retorno for bom, digo que vamos em frente.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What are the risks of launching too early?
dialogue.pt: Quais são os riscos de lançar cedo demais?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: We could lose client trust if there are bugs.
dialogue.pt: Podemos perder a confiança do cliente se houver bugs.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you suggest we do?
dialogue.pt: O que você sugere que façamos?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Run a private beta test first.
dialogue.pt: Fazer um teste beta privado primeiro.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How do you work best – alone or in a team?
dialogue.pt: Como você trabalha melhor – sozinho ou em equipe?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: It depends on the task. I like both.
dialogue.pt: Depende da tarefa. Gosto dos dois.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: When do you prefer to work alone?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: When I need to focus deeply on something.
dialogue.pt: Quando preciso focar profundamente em algo.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have any ideas to improve the product?
dialogue.pt: Você tem ideias para melhorar o produto?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I think we should add a voice feature.
dialogue.pt: Sim, acho que deveríamos adicionar um recurso de voz.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: That's interesting. What would it do?
dialogue.pt: Isso é interessante. O que faria?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Allow users to practice speaking in real time.
dialogue.pt: Permitir que usuários pratiquem fala em tempo real.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: How do you feel about the company changes?
dialogue.pt: Como você se sente sobre as mudanças na empresa?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: A bit uncertain, but I understand the reasons.
dialogue.pt: Um pouco incerto, mas entendo os motivos.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What concerns you most?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Whether the team will stay together.
dialogue.pt: Se a equipe vai continuar unida.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What are you working towards this quarter?
dialogue.pt: O que você está buscando neste trimestre?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I want to improve our conversion rate by ten percent.
dialogue.pt: Quero melhorar nossa taxa de conversão em dez por cento.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What is your strategy?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Focus on user experience and reduce friction points.
dialogue.pt: Focar na experiência do usuário e reduzir pontos de atrito.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can I give you some feedback?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Of course. I appreciate it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Your presentations are great, but the pace is too fast.
dialogue.pt: Suas apresentações são ótimas, mas o ritmo é rápido demais.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Thank you. I'll work on slowing down.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: There's a conflict between two team members.
dialogue.pt: Há um conflito entre dois membros da equipe.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: What happened?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: They disagree about how to handle the project.
dialogue.pt: Eles discordam sobre como gerenciar o projeto.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Let's bring them together and find common ground.
dialogue.pt: Vamos reuni-los e encontrar um terreno comum.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What keeps you motivated at work?
dialogue.pt: O que te mantém motivado no trabalho?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Seeing the impact of what I do.
dialogue.pt: Ver o impacto do que faço.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What does that look like for you?
dialogue.pt: Como isso se manifesta para você?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: When users say the product changed how they work.
dialogue.pt: Quando usuários dizem que o produto mudou como trabalham.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What did you learn this quarter?
dialogue.pt: O que você aprendeu neste trimestre?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I learned to delegate more and trust my team.
dialogue.pt: Aprendi a delegar mais e confiar na minha equipe.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: That's a big lesson. What changed?
dialogue.pt: Essa é uma grande lição. O que mudou?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: The team performed better when I gave them space.
dialogue.pt: A equipe teve melhor desempenho quando dei espaço a eles.
